name: clay
description: Find, enrich, and organize GTM accounts, contacts, and prospecting workflows from Clay.

interface.shortDescription: Find and enrich GTM accounts, contacts, and prospects.
interface.longDescription: Clay connects Codex to your GTM workflows so you can find prospects, enrich leads, summarize account context, and organize outreach signals from Clay data.
defaultPrompt: Find Clay records matching this ICP and summarize the strongest prospect accounts.
Enrich these leads in Clay with company, role, and outreach context.
Build a Clay prospecting list for this segment and identify useful signals.
